title: geranium bicknellii var. longipes
intro: Geranium bicknellii var. longipes, also known as Bicknell's geranium, is a perennial plant species native to the western United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Geranium bicknellii var. longipes include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce swelling, and support wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including skin conditions and digestive problems.
